package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	redis "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

// scenario for redis_command_loop_without_pipeline: Redis command loops that issue round-trips without pipeline or batch usage.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: data_access; severity: info.
func scenario289Positive(ctx context.Context, client *redis.Client, keys []string) error {
	for _, key := range keys {
		if err := client.Get(ctx, key).Err(); err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return client.Ping(ctx).Err()
}
